title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§802.  Budget to include additional salary

The governing authority of the parish of Terrebonne shall annually and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed by R.S. 16:801.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 306, §1.
